name: StarPromptDialog
description: One-time nudge asking a repeat user to star the project on GitHub.
notes: Figma is not linked yet. Bespoke night-sky illustration (scoped <style>: twinkling stars + CSS shooting stars, adapted from constgenius/ShootingStar) so it uses raw decorative colours rather than design tokens; the surface is intentionally dark regardless of theme. Auto-opens from app state (launch count, seen flag) via bindings, gated behind the What's New dialog; renders closed in Storybook where those stores are inert.
